kirundi.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Ubaka • Gukoporora • Kwandika • Guhindura • Guhinduka • CRISPR • Siyansi y'ubutabera
kirundi.build_the_double_helix_from_4_letters: Ubaka double helix uhereye ku nyuguti 4
kirundi.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A ihuza na T (bond 2), G na C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) bakemuye iyi miterere bakoresheje X-ray crystallography. Iyo miterere yerekana uko DNA yikoporora kandi isomwa.
kirundi.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase itandukanya strand; DNA polymerase yubaka strand yuzuye. Semi-conservative — buri helix nshya ifite strand ishaje imwe + nshya imwe. Meselson na Stahl babyerekanye mu 1958.
kirundi.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase isoma DNA strand imwe 3′→5′ ikubaka RNA 5′→3′. Inyuguti ni zimwe, gusa T iba U. mRNA itwara amabwiriza kugeza ku ribosome — intambwe ya mbere ya central dogma.
kirundi.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code irenze). AUG itangira; UAA/UAG/UGA zihagarika. tRNA isoma codon, izana amino acid nyayo, yubaka peptide bond.
kirundi.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — inyuguti imwe yasimbuwe. Insertion/deletion — reading frame irimuka, protein yose yo hasi yangirika. Sickle cell anemia ni A→T imwe gusa — inyuguti imwe, ingaruka ku buzima bwose.
kirundi.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Sisitemu y'ubudahangarwa bwa bagiteri yakoreshejwe ku kindi. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = umukasi wa molekile. Doudna + Charpentier batsindiye Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy ya mbere (sickle cell) FDA yayemeje muri Ukuboza 2023.
kirundi.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence igena structure igena umurimo. Hemoglobin itwara O₂, antibody irabimenya, enzyme ikora catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) yahanuye structure miliyoni 200 — ikibazo cy'imyaka 50 cyakemutse mu mezi 18.
kirundi.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Siyansi y'ubutabera — STR profiling + ibimenyetso bya DNA
kirundi.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS ikoresha short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Amahirwe y'uko bihuza ari ay'igitangaza (rimwe kuri quadrillion) igihe loci zose zihuza. Innocence Project — ibihano birenga 245 by'amakosa byavanyweho nyuma yo gupima DNA.
kirundi.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Toza transcription, translation, gutandukanya mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (rimwe na rimwe RNA) ni ishingiro ryo gutanga amakuru y'irondakoko. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
kirundi.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Kwitoza kubona — mu buryo bw'umukino. Umuvuduko wubaka automaticity — igihe kureba codon table bihinduka gukorwa byonyine, working memory yawe iba yisanzuye ku bitekerezo byo hejuru, nk'uguhanura ingaruka za mutation.
kirundi.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — hamwe na retrovirus (HIV) isubira inyuma na reverse transcriptase. Crick yahimbye ijambo "dogma" mu 1957; nyuma avuga risobanura igitekerezo, atari ukuri budahangarwa.
kirundi.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Hitamo sequence — strand yuzuza yuzuzwa na base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA nyayo yubakwa gutya buri gihe.
kirundi.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase ifungura helix; DNA polymerase isoma buri template strand ikubaka uzuzuza. Semi-conservative — buri daughter strand ifite ishaje imwe + nshya imwe.
kirundi.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase isoma template strand. Amategeko amwe ya complementarity, ariko T → U. Igisubizo — mRNA copy imwe ya single-strand, yiteguye gusohoka mu nucleus.
kirundi.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome isoma codon (base 3 icyarimwe). buri codon → amino acid imwe. Genetic code isomwa nka triplet itariho kwisumbuka, itariho akitso.
kirundi.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein ntihinduka), missense (amino acid itandukanye), nonsense (guhagarara hakiri kare). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) akenshi irangiza byose.
kirundi.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA yerekeza Cas9 kuri target ya 20-base. Cas9 ica strand zombi. Repair pathway z'akagingo zifunga gene cyangwa zongeraho template watanze.
kirundi.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (guhina 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Guhindura amino acid imwe bishobora kwangiza guhina.
kirundi.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Amahirwe y'uko bihuza ku bw'impanuka muri loci zose ni nka rimwe kuri miliyari. Ikoreshwa muri CODIS, paternity test, na forensic lab.
kirundi.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Puzzle ya DNA nshasha buri session. Hindura, menya mutation, rondera ORF canke torora urubanza rwa forensic. Streak counter ikurikirana intsinzi ya buri musi.
kirundi.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Igerageza ry'umuvuduko ryo guhindura. Decode codon vuba urwana n'isaha. Gerageza niba genetic code iri mu mutwe wawe, atari ku reference card gusa.
kirundi.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, amategeko ya base pairing, amagambo y'ingenzi (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet ushobora gusubira ureba.
kirundi.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA ni copy ya coding strand aho U ifata umwanya wa T. (RNA polymerase isoma complementary template strand 3'→5', igatanga sequence isa na coding strand.)
kirundi.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Nta PAM site (NGG) yabonetse. Gerageza DNA sequence itandukanye uva muri Build tab.
kirundi.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Double-strand break yakozwe! Hitamo repair pathway:
kirundi.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) ni gene-editing technology ikomoka ku budahangarwa bwa bagiteri.
kirundi.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Ikenewe kuri binding.
kirundi.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, ubwubatsi bw'ibihingwa, moderi z'indwara.
kirundi.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
kirundi.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
kirundi.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Buri imwe yerekana DNA sequence ngufi mbere/nyuma yerekana impinduka. Hitamo ubwoko bw'ingaruka — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, cyangwa in-frame indel. Nyuma yo guhitamo, coaching isobanura impamvu iyi ngaruka ishoboka kurusha izindi.
kirundi.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Akenshi phosphorylated.
kirundi.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Ikora disulfide bond (S-S). Y'ingenzi kuri protein folding.
kirundi.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid nini kurusha izindi.
kirundi.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site ya enzyme nyinshi (pKa ~7).
kirundi.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Akenshi acetylated/methylated.
kirundi.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — degenerate kurusha izindi.
kirundi.acidic_most_abundant_in_proteins: Acidic. Nyinshi kurusha izindi muri protein.
kirundi.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Nto kurusha izindi. Nta side chain — flexibility ihanitse.
kirundi.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase ifungura double helix ku replication origin. Single-strand binding protein zibuza re-annealing. Topoisomerase igabanya supercoil tension imbere ya fork.
kirundi.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase ishyiraho RNA primer ngufi (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase ikeneye 3'-OH kugira ngo extend, bityo ntishobora gutangira strand nshya yonyine.
kirundi.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Ikorwa idahagarara 5'→3' mu cyerekezo kimwe replication fork igenda. primer imwe kuri buri origin.
kirundi.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: Ikorwa nka fragment ngufi 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) kubera ko polymerase yextend gusa 5'→3'. Buri fragment ikeneye primer yayo.
kirundi.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: RNA primer zicibwa zisimburwa na DNA nucleotide.
kirundi.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Ihuza Okazaki fragment mu gukora phosphodiester bond ya nyuma.
kirundi.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase igenzura buri base; mismatch ivanwaho igasimburwa. Igabanya error rate kuva ~10⁻⁵ kugeza ~10⁻⁷.
kirundi.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Ifata mismatch nkeya zacitse proofreading. error rate ya nyuma — ~10⁻¹⁰ kuri buri base pair.
kirundi.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase ihuza na promoter (urugero TATA box ~25 bp upstream ya transcription start). Ifasha melt DNA double helix.
kirundi.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase isoma template strand 3'→5' ikora synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Muri bagiteri yongeraho ~nucleotide 30 kuri segonda; ~10-50 muri eukaryote.
kirundi.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bagiteri — rho-dependent cyangwa intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage na polyadenylation signal.
kirundi.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: 7-methylguanosine cap yongewe ku 5' end. Ifasha ribosome kumenya mRNA + irinda degradation.
kirundi.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Intron ivanyweho, exon ihujwe na spliceosome. Alternative splicing → protein nyinshi ku gene imwe.
kirundi.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: adenine nucleotide ~100-250 yongewe ku 3' end. Ikomeza mRNA + iyerekana export yayo.
kirundi.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA yakuze isohoka inyuze mu nuclear pore igera ku cytoplasm.
kirundi.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit ihuza na mRNA. Initiator tRNA (itwara Met) ihuza na start codon AUG. Large subunit yiyongeraho.
kirundi.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Buri cycle — aminoacyl-tRNA yinjira A site → peptide bond ikorwa (23S rRNA ikora catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome yimuka codon imwe → tRNA ijya A→P→E.
kirundi.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) imenywa na release factor. Peptide irekurwa, ribosome iratandukana.
kirundi.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) zifasha protein guhina neza. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
kirundi.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon irahinduka, ariko amino acid ni imwe (genetic code redundancy). Nta ngaruka.
kirundi.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon irahinduka → amino acid itandukanye. Ingaruka kuva nta na kimwe (conservative substitution) kugeza ikomeye (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
kirundi.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon irahinduka → STOP codon. Protein iracibwa, akenshi non-functional.
kirundi.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Yongeraho nucleotide. Niba atari multiple ya 3, reading frame irimuka → codon zose zo hasi zihinduka. Akenshi ikomeye.
kirundi.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Ikuraho nucleotide. Igisubizo cya frameshift kimwe na insertion.
kirundi.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Kopi z'inyongera za gene cyangwa akarere. Bishobora gutera dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 y'inyongera).
kirundi.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Igice cya chromosome cyahindutse. Gishobora kwangiza gene ku breakpoint.
kirundi.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Igice cyimukira ku chromosome itandukanye. Icyamamare — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
kirundi.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Unité isubiramo (urugero CAG) yaguka mu bisekuru. Huntington (CAG muri HTT), fragile X (CGG muri FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
kirundi.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Pariki 1-22 (zibarwa hafi ku bunini, hariho ibitandukanye — chr. 21 iri ntoya kuri chr. 22).
kirundi.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (gore) cyangwa XY (gabo). Y iri ntoya cyane, itwara gene nkeya (~70) ugereranyije na X (~800).
kirundi.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Pariki 23 (diploid muri somatic cell). Gamete ni haploid (chromosome 23, nta pariki).
kirundi.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Nkeya mu buryo butangaje — gene nyinshi zikora protein nyinshi hakoreshejwe alternative splicing. Igice kinini cya genome ni regulatory cyangwa non-coding.
kirundi.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Niba byambuwe, ~1.8 m ya DNA kuri buri akagingo. Yometse mu nucleus ~10 µm hakoreshejwe histone + supercoiling.
kirundi.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Iterurwa na nyina. Ikora code gene 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Kopi nyinshi kuri buri mitochondrion.
kirundi.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Yongera DNA segment yihariye na 2ⁿ (cycle n). Ikoresha Taq polymerase yihanganira ubushyuhe. Ishingiro rya molecular biology ya kijyambere.
kirundi.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Isoma DNA sequence ikoresheje chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Ubu akenshi yasimbuwe na next-generation sequencing.
kirundi.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — ikora sequence miliyoni za fragment icyarimwe. Illumina irayobora. Read length ~100-300 bp, miliyari kuri buri run.
kirundi.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA iyobora nuclease Cas9 kuri DNA yihariye. Cut ikora gene knockout cyangwa HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
kirundi.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Ihindura base imwe nta double-strand break. off-target effect nkeya kuri Cas9.
kirundi.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein za bagiteri zica DNA ku sequence yihariye 4-8 bp. Zatumye recombinant DNA technology ishoboka. Nobel 1978.
kirundi.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Ihuza DNA fragment hakoreshejwe phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase ni cloning workhorse.
kirundi.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Itandukanya DNA fragment ku bunini muri electric field. fragment ntoya yimuka vuba muri gel matrix.
kirundi.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Ibihumbi bya DNA probe ku chip. Ipima gene expression cyangwa detect SNP muri parallel.
kirundi.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Ikora sequence mRNA iva ku kagingo kamwe. Yerekana cell-type heterogeneity iyo bulk RNA-seq itabona.
kirundi.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Structure ya near-atomic ya RNA/DNA complex nta crystallization. Ikomeye kuri ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
kirundi.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length kugeza 100 kb+ (ugereranyije na ~300 bp ya Illumina). Nziza kuri structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
kirundi.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Kororoka gutandukanye bishingiye kuri variation ishobora kwragwa. Gene zinoza survival/reproduction ziba nyinshi mu bisekuru.
kirundi.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Isoko ry'impanuka rya genetic variation nshya. Akenshi neutral cyangwa mbi; gake y'inyungu. substrate ya selection.
kirundi.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Impinduka z'impanuka muri allele frequency, cyane cyane muri population nto. Founder effect + bottleneck ni ingero zikabije.
kirundi.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Kwimuka kwa allele hagati ya population hakoreshejwe migration. Bigabanya itandukaniro hagati ya population; byiyongera diversity mu population.
kirundi.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Ishingwa rya species nshya, akenshi hakoreshejwe reproductive isolation. Allopatric (gutandukana kw'ubutaka) ni yo isanzwe kurusha.
kirundi.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Ibinyabuzima bidafitanye isano bikora evolve imico isa mu buryo bwigenga (amababa y'inyoni, uduhurutu, udukoko; ijisho rya vertebrate + cephalopod).
kirundi.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Ubuzima bwose busangiye sekuruza umwe (LUCA). Ibimenyetso — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry y'ibanze isangiwe.
kirundi.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Igishushanyo cyerekana isano ya evolution. Cyubakwa kenshi ku igereranya rya DNA sequence aho kuba morphology.
kirundi.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency iguma imwe munsi y'ibitekerezo bya no-evolution — population nini, random mating, nta selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
kirundi.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Ireme rya interactive — hitamo ingingo hasi kugira ngo ushakishe.
kirundi.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base eshanu zikora DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) zifite ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) zifite 1. Pairing hakurikijwe H-bond pattern yihariye.
kirundi.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) zikora code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code irenze (degenerate) — amino acid nyinshi zifite codon nyinshi, akenshi zitandukanye ku mwanya wa gatatu ("wobble"). Universal hafi ubuzima bwose.
kirundi.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Umwanya wa gatatu wa codon uhuza mu buryo budakomeye — tRNA imwe ishobora kumenya codon nyinshi. Igabanya umubare wa tRNA ukenewe (cell ifite ~30-40, atari 64).
kirundi.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — buri helix nshya ifite parental imwe + newly-synthesized strand imwe. Meselson-Stahl babyerekanye mu 1958. ~50 bp/segonda muri bagiteri; ~50 bp/segonda kuri fork muri eukaryote (ariko ibihumbi bya fork parallel).
kirundi.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase isoma DNA template (3'→5') ikora synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Muri eukaryote, primary transcript ikorwaho process nyinshi mbere ya export.
kirundi.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome isoma mRNA nka 3-base codon ikora protein. ~10-20 amino acid/segonda muri bagiteri; ~3-5 muri eukaryote. Ribosome nyinshi zishobora translate mRNA imwe (polyribosome).
kirundi.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation zitangira ku zitagaragara (silent) kugeza ku zica. Ingaruka zazo ziterwa n'icyahindutse, aho, na cell type.
kirundi.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Ingero z'indwara z'irondakoko zisobanuwe neza. Ibikoresho bya genetic counseling na therapy bya none birakura — ku byemezo bya clinical reba ibitabo bya none.
kirundi.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Umuryango A — ibisekuru bitatu, amaso y'ubururu
kirundi.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Ababyeyi babiri batabangamiwe (gen. I) bafite umwana umwe wabangamiwe + umwe utabangamiwe (gen. II). Umwana wabangamiwe + uwo bashakanye utabangamiwe bafite umwe wabangamiwe + umwe utabangamiwe (gen. III). Imico igaragara kuri ~25% by'abana ku cross y'abatabangamiwe.
kirundi.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Imico isimbuka ibisekuru (ababyeyi batabangamiwe → umwana wabangamiwe).
kirundi.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Ababyeyi bagomba kuba heterozygous carrier aho buri umwe atanga recessive allele imwe.
kirundi.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Abantu babangamiwe bagaragara mu bitsina byombi ku frequency hafi imwe.
kirundi.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Wabangamiwe = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) ni phenotypically utabangamiwe.
kirundi.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Umuryango B — ubuhumyi bw'amabara mu bisekuru bitatu
kirundi.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Sekuru wabangamiwe (gen. I) afite umukobwa utabangamiwe (gen. II) na sekuru wabangamiwe binyuze kuri uwo mukobwa (gen. III). Nta muhungu wabangamiwe uva kuri se utabangamiwe. Imico igaragara cyane mu bagabo.
kirundi.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Imico yerekana male bias ikomeye (hemizygous abagabo barayigaragaza; abagore bakeneye copy 2).
kirundi.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Umukobwa utabangamiwe wa sekuru wabangamiwe ni carrier ku gahato.
kirundi.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Imico isimbuka igisekuru binyuze ku mukobwa carrier, hanyuma ikongera kugaragara kuri sekuru.
kirundi.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Nta father-to-son transmission (abahungu bakura Y kuri se, atari X).
kirundi.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Umuryango C — imico itangira kera nka Huntington
kirundi.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Buri muntu wabangamiwe afite byibura umubyeyi umwe wabangamiwe. Imico igaragara mu buri gisekuru. ~50% by'abana b'abungamiwe barabangamiwe. Bingana mu bagabo + abagore.
kirundi.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Buri muntu wabangamiwe afite byibura umubyeyi umwe wabangamiwe.
kirundi.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency ingana mu bagabo + abagore — autosomal, atari sex-linked.
kirundi.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — byombi bigomba kwemezwa mbere ya reveal. Reveal itanga amanota ku ranking yawe intambwe ku ntambwe, atari igisubizo cyawe cya nyuma gusa. Igenzura nyaryo rishaka ko umenya impamvu, atari icyo gusa.
kirundi.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Shyira izi nsobanuro ku rutonde (nyinshi → nkeya zishyigikira):
kirundi.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Menya — ranking grade yigenga kuri pattern grade — ushobora kumenya icyo ari cyo ariko ugashyira impamvu ku rutonde rubi.
kirundi.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Mu gihe cyo gukora gamete, allele ebyiri za buri gene zitandukana, ku buryo buri gamete itwara allele imwe.
kirundi.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele za gene zitandukanye zikora assort mu buryo bwigenga imwe ku yindi mu gihe cyo gukora gamete (gene ku chromosome zitandukanye).
kirundi.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Iyo allele ebyiri zitandukanye zihari, imwe (dominant) iragaragara mu gihe indi (recessive) yihishe.
kirundi.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Methyl group (–CH₃) yongewe ku cytosine, cyane cyane ku CpG island. Akenshi iceceka gene expression.
kirundi.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation ya histone tail. Ihindura chromatin packaging.
kirundi.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex zikora slide cyangwa zisohora nucleosome kugira ngo zerekane DNA.
kirundi.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA zigenzura gene expression post-transcriptionally.
kirundi.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Gene zimwe zigaragara gusa kuri maternal cyangwa paternal allele. Methylation mark.
kirundi.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: epigenetic mark zimwe zirokoka gametogenesis zikagera ku offspring.
kirundi.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Ninde ushobora kugera ku genome yawe? GINA (2008, US) ibuza genetic discrimination ku kazi + health insurance, ariko ntabwo ku life insurance.
kirundi.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA byerekana ancestry + health risk. Impungenge — incidental finding, ukuri, gusangira data na third party.
kirundi.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Mu 2018 He Jiankui yahinduye embryo ku HIV resistance → impanga zavutse. Byaciwe cyane. Ibihugu byinshi bibuza germline editing.
kirundi.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Guhitamo cyangwa guhindura kw'ibitekerezo kwa embryo ku mico itari iy'ubuzima (uburebure, IQ). Ubu bigarukira kuri tekiniki; impaka ku myitwarire.
kirundi.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Byubatswe gukwira mu wild population (urugero malaria resistance ku mibu). Ecological idasubirwaho ishobora kubaho.
kirundi.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Twagombye gupima indwara zidashobora kuvurwa (Huntington)? Bamwe bahitamo kutamenya.
kirundi.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search yakemuye cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) ariko itera ibibazo ku privacy y'imiryango itabyemeye.
kirundi.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) yaciye urubanza ko DNA kamere idashobora kuba patent, ariko synthetic cDNA irashoboka.
kirundi.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome mu mateka ni Eurocentric. Imbaraga zo kunoza reference diversity zirakomeza (urugero human pangenome project).
kirundi.genome_sizes_across_life: 📏 Ubunini bwa genome mu buzima bwose
kirundi.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Ubunini bwa genome ntibujyana n'ubunyabwenge bw'organism (C-value paradox). Umuntu afite gene count nka roundworm — igice kinini cya DNA "y'inyongera" muri genome nini ni non-coding.
kirundi.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Impinduka zishobora kwragwa muri gene expression nta mpinduka ya DNA sequence. Ibidukikije, imirire, stress bigira ingaruka.
kirundi.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Ibice by'ubwubatsi bya protein. 9 ni "essential" (ntizishobora synthesize — zigomba kuva mu biryo) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
kirundi.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Mu buryo bw'ibanze, nta beneficial fixation iteganijwe. Population iri kuri mutation-selection balance cyangwa drift gusa.
kirundi.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift irayobora — fixation nkeya iteganijwe, nubwo mutation yabaho. Isanzwe muri population nto.
kirundi.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: beneficial mutation nkeya ziteganijwe kuba fixed. Standard kuri population nyinshi kamere.
kirundi.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: fixation nyinshi ziteganijwe — strong selection, population nini, cyangwa byombi. Urugero antibiotic resistance ya bagiteri.
kirundi.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime ikabije — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep nyinshi icyarimwe.
kirundi.mutation_inquiry_drift_selection_fixat: 🔬 Igenzura rya mutation — Drift, Selection, Fixation
kirundi.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Shyiraho per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, na selection coefficient. Hanura ni beneficial mutation zingahe zizaba fixed by'ukuri. Nta score, nta reveal.
kirundi.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — uduziga = regime isanzwe
kirundi.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Igitekerezo cyawe (slider iyihe ifite ingaruka nini kuri fixation rate? Kubera iki?)
kirundi.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: urugero selection ifite leverage kurusha μ igihe N ihagije nini...
kirundi.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Ni ryari regime yimuka iva kuri drift-dominated ijya kuri selection-dominated? N·s ikubwira iki?
kirundi.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Kubera iki antibiotic resistance na viral evolution ari vuba cyane — slider iyihe iri ku mupaka wayo?
kirundi.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) ifite fixation probability 1/(2N). Ibyo bisobanura iki kuri large population?
kirundi.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Population size imwe ishobora kuba "drift-dominated" kuri weak mutation na "selection-dominated" kuri strong icyarimwe?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu ihuriro μ × N × g × s rikora iyi regime.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — nta score, nta reveal, nta answer dump. Ikoresha Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), yinterpolate hagati ya Haldane ~2s ku strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) na neutral 1/(2N) ku drift limit (Ns≪1 cyangwa s=0).
kirundi.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Kurusha abantu (~20,000). Gene novel nyinshi ku sensory perception + cognition.
kirundi.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein yihariye (Dsup) ipfundika DNA ikayirinda kwangirika kwa X-ray. Ubushakashatsi ku radiotherapy application.
kirundi.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Kanseri ni gake cyane.
kirundi.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Inzovu zifite kopi ~20 za tumor suppressor TP53 (umuntu afite 1). Isobanuro rishoboka ku cancer rate iri hasi nubwo cell count ari nini.
kirundi.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl ishobora kongera gukura amaguru, spinal cord, umutima, ndetse n'ibice by'ubwonko. Ubushakashatsi ku regenerative medicine.
kirundi.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Ibika ibinure, atari amazi (umugani). Bituma irokoka ibyumweru nta biryo. Amazi aturuka ku kunywa + metabolic byproduct.
kirundi.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population yagabanutse ~imyaka 12,000 ishize. Genetic bottleneck → diversity iri hasi cyane. Buri cheetah iri hafi genetically nk'impanga.
kirundi.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Baleine za none zaturutse ku nyamaswa z'ubutaka zonsa (~imyaka miliyoni 50 ishize). Bene wabo ba hafi bazima — imvubu. Vestigial pelvic bone iracyariho.
kirundi.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Itandukaniro rinini. Adder's-tongue fern — pariki ~720 (nyinshi kurusha zanditswe). Umuceri — pariki 12. Umuntu — pariki 23.
kirundi.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Zose z'igore, asexual mu ~myaka miliyoni 80. Zabona gene ku species zindi (HGT) aho gutandukana kwa sex.
kirundi.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Ifi ya lobe-finned yatekerezwaga ko yazimye kuva mu gihe cya dinosaur. Ingero zizima zabonetse mu 1938. Umurongo ~imyaka miliyoni 400.
kirundi.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Ubururu (copper-based hemocyanin). Ikora detect bacterial endotoxin — ikoreshwa ku test vaccine + medical device.
kirundi.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Yatandukanye na brown bear ~imyaka 150,000-500,000 ishize. Bamwe grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" cyangwa "grolar") byemejwe mu gasozi.
kirundi.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics y'ubwoko bw'imbwa + ibyerekeye DNA y'ishyamba
kirundi.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Hormone zigenda binyuze mu maraso kugira ngo zikore ku target tissue ya kure. Zikora coordonner metabolism, gukura, kororoka, stress response, na homeostasis.
kirundi.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Composition y'ibintu hafi y'umubiri w'umuntu ku mass. Ibintu 11 gusa ni >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) bikora hafi organic molecule zose.
kirundi.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Kuzimira kwa vuba (cyane cyane umuntu yatewe) + kuzimira kwa kera kuzwi. Isi yagize mass extinction 5 — benshi bavuga ko turi mu ya 6 ubu.
kirundi.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + urumuri → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll irabikoresha. Isoko ry'igice kinini cya oxygen mu kirere.
kirundi.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (ibimera byinshi), C4 (ibigori, ikigazi cy'isukari — byiza ku T yo hejuru), CAM (cactus, succulent — bifungura stomata nijoro kugira ngo bibike amazi).
kirundi.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Utwobo duto ku mababi. Dutuma CO₂ yinjira + O₂/amazi asohoka. Bifungurwa/bifungwa hakurikijwe urumuri, amazi, CO₂.
kirundi.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Itwara amazi + mineral hejuru ivuye ku mizi. Utugingo twapfuye. Ikora transpiration pull.
kirundi.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Itwara isukari ivuye ku mababi ijya ku bindi bice by'igiti. Utugingo turazima. Icyerekezo kibiri.
kirundi.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Hormone y'igihingwa. Phototropism (gukurira ku rumuri). concentration ku ruhande rw'igicucu → utugingo tureba → bigunamira ku rumuri.
kirundi.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Hormone ya gaz. Ihisha imbuto. Impamvu urutoki ruhishije ruhisha izindi mbuto. Stress signaling.
kirundi.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Yongera uburebure bw'igiti, kumera kw'imbuto, gushyira indabyo.
kirundi.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Yongera igabana ry'akagingo. Itinza gusaza kw'ibabi.
kirundi.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Hormone ya stress. Ifunga stomata iyo amazi agabanuka. Yongera gusinzira kw'imbuto.
kirundi.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ni yihariye — sperm imwe ifecunda egg cell (embryo), indi ifecunda polar nuclei (endosperm — ibiryo by'imbuto).
kirundi.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Ishusho y'indabyo, ibara, umubavu bihuye n'ibyifuzo bya pollinator. Bamwe specialized cyane (orchid + ikinyugunyugu cyihariye).
kirundi.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Byakuze mu butaka bufite intungamubiri nkeya. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (bifata).
kirundi.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis na fungi. Fungi zongera aho imizi igera; igiti gitanga isukari. ~85% by'ibimera.
kirundi.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bagiteri mu root nodule, zihindura N₂ → NH₃. Ni yo mpamvu ibishyimbo + ibishyimbo bifite protein nyinshi + binoza ubutaka.
kirundi.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Guhinga byahisemo imbuto nini (umuceri), zidasandara (ingano), imbuto ziryoshye (pome). Vuba aha — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
kirundi.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Isanzwe mu bimera (gake mu nyamaswa). Ingano ni hexaploid (set 6), strawberry ni octoploid. Akenshi byongera vigor + yield.
kirundi.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Composé ikomeza urukuta rw'akagingo rw'ibiti. Ni yo mpamvu ibiti bikomeye + bibora buhoro.
kirundi.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Abantu ba species imwe mu karere.
kirundi.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: Ecosystem zose ku isi. Akarere k'ubuzima.
kirundi.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Uruhare rwa species muri ecosystem yayo. Species ebyiri ntizishobora gufata niche imwe (competitive exclusion).
kirundi.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Network ya nde urya nde. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → n'ibindi.
kirundi.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Bikora ibiryo byabo. Ibimera, algae, bagiteri zimwe. Ishingiro rya food chain.
kirundi.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Babona ibiryo mu kurya abandi. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
kirundi.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Bimena ibintu byapfuye. Fungi, bagiteri, decomposer. Bikora recycle intungamubiri.
kirundi.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Interaction ya hafi hagati ya species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
kirundi.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Ingaruka idahwanye kuri ecosystem nubwo umubare ari muto. Otter yo mu mazi igenzura sea urchin, izo zigenzura kelp.
kirundi.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size ntarengwa environment ishobora gutwara. Resource, predation, disease bigabanya K.
kirundi.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population ikura ku gipimo gihoraho. dN/dt = rN. Ntishobora gukomeza iteka.
kirundi.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Gukura bigabanuka uko N yegera K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve ishusho ya S.
kirundi.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Urubyaro rwinshi, ubwitonzi bw'ababyeyi buke, ubuzima bugufi. Udukoko, ibyatsi bibi. Boom-and-bust.
kirundi.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Urubyaro ruke, ubwitonzi bwinshi, ubuzima burebure. Baleine, umuntu, igiti cya oak.
kirundi.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Impinduka zishobora guhanurwa mu muryango uko igihe kigenda. Primary (urutare rwuzuye) vs. secondary (nyuma y'ikibazo).
kirundi.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Ubwoko butandukanye bw'ubuzima. Species richness (umubare) + evenness (isaranganya). Biodiversity yo hejuru → ecosystem resilience.
kirundi.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 kuri miliyoni y'imyaka. Igipimo cya none ni 100-1000× cya background kubera umuntu.
kirundi.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Akarere k'ubuzima kanini gasobanuwe n'ikirere + ibimera. Tropical rainforest, ubutayu, tundra, savanna, n'ibindi.
kirundi.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → subira N₂ (denitrification).
kirundi.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel isubiza C yashyinguwe igihe kirekire mu kirere.
kirundi.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Guhumeka → guhindukana → imvura → gutemba/amazi yo munsi y'ubutaka → subira mu nyanja.
kirundi.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Kwimuka kw'ibintu (C, N, P, S) binyuze mu biotic + abiotic compartment.
kirundi.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: Buri imwe yatoranyijwe ku mico ituma biology ishobora gucungwa — ubunini, fast life cycle, gukura byoroshye, genetic tool.
kirundi.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Ubushyuhe butandukanya double-stranded DNA muri single strand. Hydrogen bond zicika.
kirundi.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) zihuza n'akarere kuzuza ka buri template strand.
kirundi.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — iva kuri Thermus aquaticus) ikora extend primer ikora synthesize DNA nshya.
kirundi.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Buri cycle yikuba kabiri target DNA. cycle 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
kirundi.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis yavumbuye PCR (1983); yatsindiye Nobel mu 1993.
kirundi.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Iva kuri thermophilic bacterium mu masoko y'amazi ashyushye. Irokoka denaturation step ya 95 °C.
kirundi.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye zitanga raporo kuri amplification muri real-time. Ikoreshwa ku COVID test, gene expression.
kirundi.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Ihindura RNA muri cDNA mbere. Ikoreshwa ku RNA virus (COVID, HIV, ibicurane).
kirundi.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Igabanya sample mu bihumbi bya droplet. Ibara kubaho/kutabaho — quantification nyayo cyane.
kirundi.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (nka Jurassic Park; mu by'ukuri akenshi <miliyoni y'imyaka 1).
kirundi.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy ya mbere FDA-approved (Ukuboza 2023). Ihindura patient stem cell ex vivo.
kirundi.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR ikora injiniya T cell kugira ngo zitere cancer. Phase I/II trial nyinshi.
kirundi.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library yerekana gene izihe ari essential ku ndwara.
kirundi.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Byihuse kurusha knockout mouse ya kera. Bikoreshwa cyane mu bushakashatsi.
kirundi.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Umuceri urwanya indwara, ibihumyo bidahinduka umukara, ingano gluten-free (akenshi bikiri mu bushakashatsi).
kirundi.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Bikwiza ubugumba cyangwa malaria resistance mu wild population. Field trial ikiri mu mpaka.
kirundi.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) yahinduye human embryo → uburakari moral + scientific. Ubu byaciwe mu bihugu byinshi.
kirundi.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Umubiri w'umuntu ufite ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Hafi bingana mu mubare.
kirundi.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ mu mara y'umuntu mukuru ufite ubuzima bwiza. Hamwe na archaea, fungi, virus.
kirundi.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome itwara gene ~100× kurusha human genome. Yongera ubushobozi bwinshi bwa metabolic.
kirundi.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe zivugana n'ubwonko binyuze mu vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. Bifitanye isano na mood, imyitwarire — ariko amagambo yihariye menshi yarengejwe.
kirundi.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic zisiba commensal → gukira bishobora gufata amezi/imyaka. Shift zimwe ziguma.
kirundi.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) ikiza recurrent C. difficile infection ~90% by'imanza. Ikoreshwa rindi rikiri experimental.
kirundi.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Bitandukanye ku body site — uruhanga (amavuta, Cutibacterium acnes irayobora), amara (anaerobe), ukwaha (icyuya apocrine + bagiteri → umunuko w'umubiri).
kirundi.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Ubuzima bwiza — Lactobacillus irayobora, pH iri hasi. Kutaringaniza → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
kirundi.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Igira ingaruka ku myobo y'amenyo, indwara z'ingingo. Bifitanye isano na cardiovascular risk.
kirundi.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Kubyara mu gitsina gitera umwana maternal vaginal microbe; C-section skin microbe. Ingaruka z'igihe kirekire zirasuzumwa (zimwe mu mpaka).
kirundi.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Irimo live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) zigaburira gut microbe yihariye (B. infantis).
kirundi.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg bihuza. Diploid zygote ikorwa.
kirundi.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Igabana ry'akagingo ryihuse nta gukura. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
kirundi.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Umupira wuzuye n'inner cell mass (embryo y'ejo hazaza) + trophoblast (placenta y'ejo hazaza).
kirundi.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Kwimuka kw'utugingo bikora germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
kirundi.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube ikorwa iva ku ectoderm. Ubwonko bw'ejo hazaza + spinal cord.
kirundi.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Ingingo zose nini zitangira gukorwa. Umutima utangira gukubita ~icyumweru 4-5.
kirundi.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Gukura + gukura. Ba structure nini basanzwe bakozwe.
kirundi.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell zikora growth signal zazo kugira ngo activate receptor constitutively.
kirundi.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) ntizikora → utugingo tugabanya nubwo stop signal.
kirundi.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway zahagaritswe. utugingo twangiritse turazima igihe twagombye gupfa.
kirundi.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → telomere ibungabungwa → igabana ridafite imipaka.
kirundi.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor zikora recrute imiyoboro y'amaraso kugira ngo zigaburire mass ikura.
kirundi.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: utugingo tutakaza adhesion, tukora migrate, tukora colonie tissue ya kure.
kirundi.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor ikoresha glycolysis ndetse na oxygen.
kirundi.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor yihisha kuri cyangwa isukisha immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
kirundi.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation zirundanya + chromosomal rearrangement biyobora evolution.
kirundi.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Vuba, non-specific. Uruhu, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
kirundi.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Buhoro (iminsi), specific cyane, ifite memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
kirundi.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Zikora antibody. Buri B cell ikora specificity imwe. B cell yashyizwe activate iba plasma cell.
kirundi.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Zikora coordonner immune response. target ya HIV. Ziyoborwa kuva naive kugeza specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
kirundi.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Zica utugingo twanduye cyangwa twa cancer binyuze mu perforin + granzyme.
kirundi.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein ishusho ya Y. class 5 — IgG (nyinshi kurusha), IgA (mucosa), IgM (itangira), IgE (allergie + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
kirundi.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule zitanga antigen kuri T cell. MHC I (utugingo twose, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
kirundi.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein zitobora imyobo muri pathogen + zikora recrute phagocyte.
kirundi.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule za immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (coordination), TNF (inflammation).
kirundi.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell z'ubuzima burebure ziva ku exposition ishize. Ishingiro rya vaccine + ubudahangarwa bw'ubuzima bwose.
kirundi.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Zitoza adaptive immunity nta ndwara. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
kirundi.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system itera yo ubwayo. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
kirundi.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell zisohora histamine.
kirundi.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (kwakira), soma (cell body), axon (kohereza), terminal (isohora neurotransmitter).
kirundi.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium yinjira → depolarize → potassium isohoka → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) kugeza ~100 m/s (myelinated).
kirundi.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation y'amavuta yakozwe na glia (oligodendrocyte muri CNS, Schwann cell muri PNS). Yihutisha conduction. Yangirika muri MS.
kirundi.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction hagati ya neuron. Electrical cyangwa chemical (akenshi). Gap ~0.02 µm.
kirundi.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger munsi ya synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
kirundi.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Iri hasi muri Parkinson; dysregulated muri schizophrenia.
kirundi.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, ibitotsi, ubushake bwo kurya. SSRI zikora target reuptake.
kirundi.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Iri hasi muri Alzheimer.
kirundi.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin muri CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
kirundi.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — gutekereza, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (amarangamutima + memory).
kirundi.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Ubwonko bwikora réorganiser bwongera — bukomeye kurusha mu bwana, ariko bukomeza mu buzima bwose. Ishingiro rya learning.
kirundi.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction hagati ya brain capillary cell ihagarika molecule nyinshi hanze. Ikibazo kinini kuri drug delivery kuri CNS.
kirundi.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% by'ingufu z'umubiri mu kuruhuka (nubwo ari ~2% by'mass). Cyane cyane kubera Na+/K+ pump ibungabunga ion gradient.
kirundi.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein y'umuntu ya mbere yakozwe mu bwinshi. Yakozwe muri E. coli (1982). Yasimbuye insulin y'ingurube + inka.
kirundi.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
kirundi.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application biratera imbere.
kirundi.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Zisimbura gene zangiritse. Luxturna (ubuhumyi bw'irage, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
kirundi.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell zakozwe injiniya. Yescarta + Kymriah ku blood cancer. ~$400,000 kuri dose.
kirundi.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant ni standard imyaka. newer iPSC + ESC approach mu bushakashatsi.
kirundi.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue na living cell + scaffold. Uruhu, cartilage, impyiko. Ingingo zuzuye zikiri kure.
kirundi.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Injiniya biological system. Bagiteri zikora imiti, yeast ikora opioid, algal biofuel.
kirundi.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
kirundi.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample yangiritse), Y chromosome (umurongo wa se). Kugereranya database.
kirundi.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Yerekana biogeographic ancestry + bene wabo ba DNA.
kirundi.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA mu maraso. Kumenya hakiri kare, treatment monitoring.
kirundi.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Kuvura solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved mu 2024.
kirundi.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe zakozwe injiniya zisukura oil spill, imyanda ya plastiki, ibyuma biremereye.
kirundi.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Yongera DNA sequence yihariye inshuro miliyari. workhorse ya molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
kirundi.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Mu ntangiriro bacterial immune system, ubu programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier basangiye Nobel 2020.
kirundi.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus ni non-living infectious agent — zikeneye host cell kugira ngo zororoke. Zisaranganyijwe ku genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, ishusho.
kirundi.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science iratera imbere vuba. Amagambo menshi azwi (probiotic strain yihariye "ikiza" condition yihariye) ari mbere y'ibimenyetso. Guma ku bisubizo byashimangiwe cyane.
kirundi.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — icyo buri imwe ikora
kirundi.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Byasobanuwe na Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, byavuguruwe 2011). Cancer nyinshi zibona ibimenyetso byinshi. Therapy ikora target ibimenyetso byihariye byinshi.
